completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created in-progress bug packet for SCN-039-002 operator status provider block failure. No source, test, parent artifact, or certification-owned fields modified.

Implemented status page recommendation provider block from SST-enabled config and the existing provider registry; captured targeted RED/GREEN, check, unit, broad E2E, and integration behavior evidence. Validation-owned bug status remains unchanged.

Re-ran BUG-039-002 target-relevant tests through the repo CLI: targeted provider-status E2E exit 0, Go unit exit 0, broad E2E exit 0, full integration exit 1 with the provider-specific integration case passing and unrelated NATS workqueue/MaxDeliver failures preserved as the BUG-022-001 caveat. Regression-quality, mock-audit, and skip-marker scans were clean for the target test files.

Completed regression-phase diagnostics for BUG-039-002. Focused provider-status E2E, Go unit, broad E2E, provider-specific integration behavior, and regression-quality guard show no status/web/recommendation-provider regression. Full integration remains exit 1 only from the unrelated NATS workqueue/MaxDeliver caveat; no global integration-green claim was made.

Reviewed BUG-039-002 implementation diff for reuse, quality, and efficiency. Applied one low-risk simplification by removing duplicate RecommendationProviderCount view-model plumbing and using the template range-empty branch; format, check, Go unit, and focused operator-status E2E passed. Certification-owned fields were not modified.

Completed BUG-039-002 stabilization diagnostics. Focused provider-status E2E, broad E2E, check, build, lint, and provider-specific integration evidence show no runtime or lifecycle fragility for the status provider block; full integration remains red only on the unrelated NATS BUG-022-001 caveat. No code changes were made.

Completed BUG-039-002 security diagnostics for the /status Recommendation Providers block. Source review, sensitive-pattern scan, implementation reality scan, repo check, and live auth/content probes found no secret, token, internal URL, unsafe provider config, or auth semantics regression. Full integration caveat remains unchanged for unrelated NATS BUG-022-001.

concerns.summary: The full integration command remains red due unrelated NATS workqueue/MaxDeliver failures. The BUG-039-002 provider-specific integration case passes, and this certification does not claim global integration-suite green.

executionHistory.summary: Packetized uncovered broad E2E blocker for the feature 039 operator status provider block scenario.
Restored the Recommendation Providers status block, kept the empty provider registry honest, and recorded implemented evidence while leaving validation-owned Fixed/Verified/Closed status untouched.

Completed BUG-039-002 test phase evidence for the provider-status behavior. Targeted E2E, Go unit, and broad E2E passed; full integration stayed red only because of unrelated NATS failures while TestRecommendationProviders_EmptyRegistryReturnsNoProvidersAndPersistsTrace passed; target-file regression-quality, mock-audit, and skip-marker scans were clean. Certification fields were not modified.

Ran regression diagnostics for BUG-039-002 provider-status behavior. Focused E2E, Go unit, and broad E2E passed; the provider-specific integration case passed inside the full integration command, which remains red due unrelated NATS failures. Cross-spec and design review found no route, API, registry, or status-page conflict. Certification fields were not modified.

Completed simplify review and cleanup for BUG-039-002. Reuse and efficiency passes found no actionable changes; quality pass removed redundant provider-count view-model data while preserving the status empty state. Runtime proof passed through format, check, Go unit, and focused operator-status E2E.

failures.summary: TestOperatorStatus_RecommendationProvidersEmptyByDefault reports status page missing Recommendation Providers block.

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: Single bug scope; owner starts with targeted red-stage proof before edits.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: bubbles.validate certification after targeted and broader E2E evidence.
